changeSet.author: dietrich
changeSet.sql: UPDATE iris_session SET course_id = (SELECT e.course_id FROM exercise e WHERE e.id = iris_session.exercise_id AND e.course_id IS NOT NULL) WHERE discriminator IN ('PROGRAMMING_EXERCISE_CHAT', 'TEXT_EXERCISE_CHAT') AND exercise_id IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: dietrich
changeSet.sql: UPDATE iris_session SET course_id = ( SELECT ex.course_id FROM exercise e JOIN exercise_group eg ON e.exercise_group_id = eg.id JOIN exam ex ON eg.exam_id = ex.id WHERE e.id = iris_session.exercise_id ) WHERE discriminator IN ('PROGRAMMING_EXERCISE_CHAT', 'TEXT_EXERCISE_CHAT') AND exercise_id IS NOT NULL AND course_id = 0;

changeSet.author: dietrich
dietrich
